D1 Optics L2 Understand Atom

Wavelength × Frequency = Speed

stretch a wave and watch its frequency drop to keep the speed constant

The wave's propagation speed is fixed by the medium; wavelength and frequency are reciprocal — make one larger, the other shrinks.

Slide λ. The dark wave keeps travelling at the same speed, but the crimson clock ticks faster for short λ and slower for long λ.
